full_text:
Quan Huijie 全惠解
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Quan Huijie (全惠解). Described as sensitive and beautiful, she was Sun Liang’s empress. Quan Huijie was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Quan Huijie lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
